root: ^A vampire dressed in local police department attire knocks on the front door of a house.
^What!? Why is there a police officer here? I don't remember breaking any laws, what did I do?
^There have been online threats from a user by the name of Phoenix. Ring any bells?
^What? I don't really post things online, and I've never heard of anyone named Phoenix either!
^Don't play games with me! The messages came from an IP address located in this house. I have orders to take you in for questioning. Now, open this door!
^Eek! Don't you need to show me a paper or something? You can't come inside without one, right?

consent: ^Oh.. okay, if it's a real warrant. I don't want to get in trouble.

no_violation: ^The villager opens the door and allows the vampire in disguise to take them away.
^Finally! Should've just let me in to start, villager.

no_consent: ^What? I—is that it? I don't even understand what it's saying! I won't let you in if I can't understand your papers.

violation: ^Just because you don't understand the law doesn't mean it doesn't apply to you. You're not safe with your ignorance.
no_violation: ^Just because you don't understand the law doesn't mean it doesn't apply to you. You're coming with me.
